query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  userId, 
  baseTypePattern, 
  layerPattern, 
  powerPattern, 
  shiftPattern,
  createdAt 
FROM diagnostic_results 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
